sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20007" key="bi/w|" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βίῳ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιῴην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιῶναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιώτω</orth>, <sense id="n20007.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βιόω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιῴατο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βιάω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
